title: 3 children, 3 adults displaced after fire breaks out at Chesapeake apartment
abstract: Three children and three adults were displaced after a fire broke out in a Chesapeake apartment. title: Family of man hit and killed by Tampa police files wrongful death lawsuit
abstract: The family of a 23-year-old man who was hit and killed two years ago has filed a wrongful death lawsuit against a Tampa police officer and the city.
